qa_findings.message: Prompt repeats words often: expression=7, portrait=6.

records.prompt_text: clockwork ranger with copper mask, green cloak, brass compass, expression, varied expressions, consistent character facial expression study, clean portrait reference, clean reference lighting, readable silhouette, minimal stylization. Identity anchor: same clockwork ranger in every shot; face: copper mask with narrow glass lenses; hair: dark hair tucked under hood; outfit: green travel cloak, leather chest harness, brass compass; accessories: brass compass, small map case; must keep: copper mask, green cloak, brass compass; avoid: different mask, missing compass, modern clothing. Guidance: relaxed natural posture; center-weighted composition; balanced front lighting; clean reference-sheet backdrop; preserve distinctive costume shapes and materials; show multiple clear expressions with consistent identity. Palette guidance: character reference; neutral reference colors with a few material accents; Keep identity, materials, and silhouette readable across the set. Layout: neutral expression portrait; smile expression portrait; serious expression portrait; surprised expression portrait; angry expression portrait.
records.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, cropped subject, broken anatomy, unreadable text, extra limbs, distorted layout, inconsistent identity, cluttered background, different mask, missing compass, modern clothing, heavy atmosphere, busy background, extreme lens distortion
